tweets:
0guard update: the project is now more than a hackathon demo.

It is a live pre-wallet firewall for AI agents: intent, calldata, policy, domain/reputation context, and exploit intelligence checked before any signer is asked to act.

Built on 0G. Proof-first. No custody theater.

What is live:

- Telegram Mini App
- public proof hub
- native preflight API
- reputation probe
- developer kit
- 0G mainnet receipt proof

Mini App: https://guard0-miniapp-s77j6bxyra-uc.a.run.app/telegram

No signing. No broadcasts. No fund movement.

The newest pieces are /api/threat-case-file and /api/experiments/frontier.

The case file turns one risky agent request into a proof dossier: policy, signatures, reputation, alert quality, provenance, and 0G-ready receipts.

The frontier lab turns research into safe previews.

The product thesis is simple:

AI agents should not get to the wallet first.

0guard creates a checkpoint before the wallet: allow safe read-only actions, review ambiguous ones, deny dangerous signing/payment/bridge/exchange-shaped intents.

Next builds:

1. Use threat case files as the default demo.
2. Enable one reviewed reputation connector.
3. Add operator-approved 0G Storage readback.
4. Add EVM simulation summaries.
5. Deepen Telegram/TON risk passports.

Safety middleware for agentic crypto.
